parameters.query:
SELECT
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = 'inventory' AND column_name = 'store_id') AS has_store_id,
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = 'inventory' AND column_name = 'sku') AS has_sku,
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = 'inventory' AND column_name = 'unit') AS has_unit,
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = 'inventory' AND column_name = 'category') AS has_category,
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = 'inventory' AND column_name = 'brand') AS has_brand,
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = 'inventory' AND column_name = 'is_active') AS has_is_active,
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = 'inventory' AND column_name = 'created_at') AS has_created_at,
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = 'inventory' AND column_name = 'updated_at') AS has_updated_at;

SELECT

  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = 'inventory' AND column_name = 'unit') AS has_unit,
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = 'inventory' AND column_name = 'category') AS has_category,
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = 'inventory' AND column_name = 'brand') AS has_brand,
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = 'inventory' AND column_name = 'is_active') AS has_is_active,
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = 'inventory' AND column_name = 'created_at') AS has_created_at,
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = 'inventory' AND column_name = 'updated_at') AS has_updated_at;
